KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.banter.alive.endTurnP: Patience is a virtue, yet I found mine waning.
KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.cardsModifierDescript: The History Eater cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.description:
A schoolteacher from the Human Village.
Records and manipulates history, not to be messed with during full moon.
KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.eventDeathPrevention: For my lovely students, I must hold on.
KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.goldMonologue: [sine][blue]I can buy Mokou some new clothes. She would sure be glad.[/blue][/sine]
KEINEMOD-KEINE_MOD.title: The History Eater
